issues.description: Effect completely misrepresents card ability. Card performs a conditional search/reveal of up to 2 specific cards from top 5 of deck, not a simple draw. Missing conditions for [Trigger] keyword filtering and [Dereshi!] exclusion, missing SearchDeck or equivalent action with proper filtering logic.
Trigger value 'Trigger' is invalid. Should be 'OnPlay' (Main card effect triggered on play) or another valid trigger from spec. 'Trigger' is a keyword type, not a trigger event.
Action is DrawCard with count 1, but effect requires SearchDeck action with up to 2 cards selected from top 5 by keyword filter ([Trigger] but not [Dereshi!]), plus deck ordering logic.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 2 cards with a [Trigger] other than [Dereshi!] and add them to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
